title: Unibond No More Nails Permanent Strips, Adhesive Strips for Fast & Easy Mounting, Double Sided Sticky Tape for Interior & Exterior Use, Waterproof Tape, Pack of 10
features: Multi-purpose – The versatile double sided adhesive tape offers high-strength adhesion and is designed to complete jobs both inside and outside the house.
Versatile use – The practical mounting tape strips are ideal for a range of uses including mounting hooks, signs, numbers, pictures, car number plates etc.
High-strength – The hanging strips are able to hold up to 3kg per strip and are ideal for use on wood, ceramic, tiles, metal, brick, stone and most plastics.
Waterproof glue – The no more nails strips are waterproof and white in colour, ensuring long-lasting durability and discreetness both inside and outside the home.
Package Contents – Unibond No More Nails Permanent Strips, strong double sided tape for mounting jobs inside & outside the home, for most materials*, holds up to 3kg, waterproof, white, Pack of 10
